title: Podman does not support Windows 11 on ARM65
body:
### Issue Description

@baude released a trial installer for Podman 5.5.0 https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/25621#issuecomment-2743341834 that fixes Podman installs on Windows 11 for ARM64. This doesn't yet appear to be ported to the latest Podman release (as of this writing 5.7.1).

The issue was unfortunately closed and locked to contributors, despite it still being an issue.

When can we expect this fix to be released to the latest release?

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
`podman machine init`


### Describe the results you received

```console
$ podman machine init

<3>WSL (10 - Relay) ERROR: CreateProcessCommon:640: execvpe(/bin/bash) failed: Exec format error

```

### Describe the results you expected

Podman machine initializes successfully.

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

comments.body: Closing as we do support win11 ARM. Please re-open if using the correct installer does not fix the issue.
